title: Building Your Credit Score
scenario: Your first credit card bill of ₹18,000 is due. The app offers a tempting 'minimum due' of just ₹900, which would let you keep more cash this month. You know your credit score will matter when you apply for a home loan in a few years.

choices.label: Pay the full ₹18,000 bill on or before the due date, every month
choices.lesson: Paying bills in full and on time is the strongest driver of a healthy credit score, and avoids steep revolving interest.

choices.label: Pay only the minimum due and carry the rest forward
choices.lesson: Paying only the minimum triggers interest near 40% a year on the balance and signals risk, dragging your score down.
